resources.string:
HandTrack Gesture Controller allows you to control your device using hand gestures captured by your camera.


This accessibility service enables:
 • Converting hand gestures into touch events (taps, swipes, scrolls)
 • Performing system actions (back, home, recent apps)
 • Controlling your device without touching the screen


PERMISSIONS REQUIRED:
 • Access to screen content: To understand context for gesture actions
 • Touch injection: To convert hand gestures into actual touches
 • Global actions: To perform system navigation


PRIVACY:
 HandTrack processes all gesture data locally on your device. No data is sent to external servers.


To use HandTrack:
 1. Enable this accessibility service
 2. Grant camera and overlay permissions
 3. Start hand tracking from the app
 4. Use hand gestures to control your device


You can disable this service at any time from Accessibility Settings.
